data.description:
## What
Add an `mcp_registry` job to `.github/workflows/release.yml` that publishes
`server.json` to the MCP Registry on a `v*` tag using **GitHub Actions OIDC**
(`mcp-publisher login github-oidc`) — eliminating the interactive
`mcp-publisher login github` device flow (whose cached Registry JWT expires and
was the one manual, friction-prone channel during the v0.7.0 release).

## Why
PyPI already publishes via OIDC Trusted Publishing and (change 314/316) GitHub
Releases are auto-created. The MCP Registry was the last channel still requiring a
human browser login. OIDC needs no stored secret: the runner's OIDC token proves the
`navapbc/rebar` repo identity, which authorizes the `io.github.navapbc/*` namespace.

## Implementation (per modelcontextprotocol.io/registry/github-actions)
- New job `mcp_registry`, `needs: publish` (runs after PyPI so the registry's
  package-ownership check resolves against the live version), same
  `if: github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')` gate.
- `permissions: { id-token: write, contents: read }`.
- Steps: `actions/checkout@v5` (server.json lives in the repo) → install mcp-publisher
  (curl the release binary, os/arch-detected) → `./mcp-publisher login github-oidc`
  → `./mcp-publisher publish`.
- No version step needed: the `Release X.Y.Z` commit bumps server.json before the tag,
  so the tag tree already carries the correct version.
- Update `docs/releasing.md` §4 to mark MCP Registry as automated (OIDC in CI), demoting
  the manual `mcp-publisher login/publish` to a fallback.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `.github/workflows/release.yml` has an `mcp_registry` job with `id-token: write`, gated to `v*` tag push, that checks out the repo, installs mcp-publisher, runs `login github-oidc`, and `publish`.
- [ ] The job runs after `publish` (`needs: publish`).
- [ ] `docs/releasing.md` documents MCP Registry publishing as automated via OIDC (manual path demoted to fallback).
- [ ] Change lands on main through Gerrit (LLM-Review + Verified green).
data.title: release.yml: auto-publish to MCP Registry via GitHub Actions OIDC (no interactive login)
